scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build ../core --target web --out-dir ../web/src/wasm --out-name core && wasm-pack build ../core --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --out-name core
scripts.wasm:dev: wasm-pack build ../core --dev --target web --out-dir ../web/src/wasm --out-name core && wasm-pack build ../core --dev --target web --out-dir ../web/public/wasm --out-name core
